answer: The zip code 78744 had the highest number of issued construction permits (3,715) and code violations (1,781) during the analyzed period. Other notable zip codes include 78704 with 3,561 permits and 1,701 violations, and 78745 with 3,137 permits and 1,741 violations. This indicates a significant overlap in areas with high construction activity and code enforcement cases.
